Powerful Features

Everything you need to create, customize, and deploy professional audio branding.

AI-Powered Generation

Generate professional jingles instantly using advanced AI music composition technology.

Template Library

Choose from 50+ professionally designed templates across all industries and moods.

Customization

Fine-tune tempo, instruments, length, and brand voice to match your exact needs.

Real-Time Preview

Hear your jingle instantly and iterate until it's perfect.

Multi-Format Export

Download as MP3, WAV, or STEMS for maximum compatibility.

Share & Collaborate

Share jingles with team members and get feedback in real-time.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.

Starter

Perfect for exploring

Free
  • 5 jingles per month
  • 5-15 second lengths
  • 10 templates
  • MP3 export only
  • Community support
MOST POPULAR

Pro

For active creators

$29/month
  • Unlimited jingles
  • 5-30 second lengths
  • 50+ templates
  • MP3, WAV, STEMS export
  • Priority support
  • Custom instrument packs
  • Brand voice library

Enterprise

For agencies & brands

Custom
  • Everything in Pro
  • White-label solutions
  • Dedicated account manager
  • API access
  • Custom voice training
  • Unlimited users
  • Commercial rights included
